info.title: Moody's Analytics AutoCycle API
info.description: API access to Moody's Analytics AutoCycle Forecast

post.summary: The forecast endpoint that takes in an array of model inputs and returns the forecast

parameters.name: modelVersion
parameters.description: The monthly model version using vYYYYMM format

get.summary: The vins endpoint takes in make, model, model year and model version of vehicle and performs a vin look up

parameters.name: vehicleModel
parameters.description:
Model of the vehicle
           Vehicle model is a partial match with the model of vehicle 
           	E.g.input(vehicleMake = 'BMW', vehicleModel = 'X3')
           		 ouput(vehicleMake= 'BMW', vehicleModel = 'X3 series')

parameters.name: modelVersion
parameters.description:
Model Version is the version of the statistical/economic model, which is published every month
              The monthly model version using vYYYYMM format
